entry.title: Epoch Finds AI Detectors Miss 26% of Scientific Writing Disguised as Human
entry.summary: Epoch AI finds that style-mimicking AI fools leading detectors up to 29% of the time, with scientific writing as the biggest blind spot

entry.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 Beats Claude at Coding for 4.6x Less Money
entry.summary: Kimi K3 debuts at #3 on DeepSWE, matching Claude Fable and GPT-5.6 Sol as the first open-weights model to reach frontier-level coding performance at 2.8 trillion parameters.

entry.title: Mira Murati's Inkling Tops Every Open-Weight Model on ARC-AGI-2
entry.summary: Thinking Machines' Inkling becomes the top open-weight model on ARC-AGI-1 and ARC-AGI-2, scoring 79.5% and 36.5% respectively at under $1 per task.

entry.title: Databricks Raises at $188B, Doubling Down on Enterprise AI Infrastructure
entry.summary: Databricks signs a term sheet for a new round led by Coatue at a $188B valuation, up 40% from its last raise just months ago, to fund its multi-AI governance and agent infrastructure push.

entry.title: LM Studio Ships Bionic, a Full AI Agent Built on Open Local Models
entry.summary: LM Studio launches Bionic, an agentic AI for open models with local voice transcription, document editing, coding, and privacy-first cloud inference via Zero Data Retention.

entry.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 Drops 2.8 Trillion Parameters to Beat OpenAI and Anthropic
entry.summary: Moonshot AI's 2.8T parameter Kimi K3 launches with frontier-level agentic performance, a 1M token context window, and open weights on the way

entry.title: Cohere Brings its Sovereign AI Platform North Back to University of Toronto
entry.summary: Cohere's North platform becomes the AI backbone of the University of Toronto, marking a symbolic homecoming for the startup's three founders

entry.title: Cognition Offers Startups $65K to Build Their Entire Codebase With Devin
entry.summary: Cognition launches 'Devin for Startups,' offering VC-backed early-stage teams up to $65K in credits and matching grants to integrate the AI coding agent into their engineering workflow.

entry.title: Google Cloud's Gemini Platform Adds Parallel Web Search to Cut Agent Hallucinations
entry.summary: Google Cloud adds Parallel Web Systems as a native grounding provider on Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, giving agents a dedicated search index built for agentic workloads

entry.title: Google's Nano Banana Now Lets You Drop Yourself Into Any AI Video
entry.summary: Gemini now lets you set up a persistent digital avatar once and place yourself in any AI-generated image or video without re-uploading a selfie each time.

entry.title: H Company's Holo3.1 Hits 78.85% on Desktop Tasks, Beating OpenAI and Anthropic
entry.summary: H Company's fully managed computer-use agent API is now in open beta, powered by Holo3.1, the #1 model on OSWorld-Verified at 80.4%

entry.title: Manus Ships typst-pdf-maker Turning Plain Prompts Into Print-Ready PDFs
entry.summary: Manus adds a /typst-pdf-maker skill that turns a single prompt into a professionally typeset PDF, no LaTeX or design tools required.
